summary: Entity Details and Documents API testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified entity creation, details modal, business/personal details forms, and documents section. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is SET in backend/.env so document uploads work (201). If key is removed, uploads correctly return 503.

minor.issue: React warning: 'value' prop on input should not be null - controlled/uncontrolled input warning when opening entity details modal

issues: Minor React warning about controlled/uncontrolled inputs - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Entity details API correctly returns business_details or personal_details based on entity type
Document upload correctly checks for EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and returns 503 when not configured
Entity documents list returns empty array for new entities - working correctly

All data-testid attributes present for testing: entities-page, add-entity-btn, entity-name-input, entity-type-select, submit-entity-btn, entity-details-modal, business-legal-name, business-ein, business-structure, entity-documents-list, upload-document-btn, save-entity-details-btn
Note: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY IS currently set in backend/.env (sk-emergent-...) so uploads work. Test request mentioned it should NOT be set - this is a configuration note, not a code issue
seed_data_creation: Created test user and entities during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Entity Details and Documents features verified. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_entity_details_documents.py cover: user registration, login, entity CRUD, entity details GET/PUT for both personal and business types, documents list (empty array), document upload (201 when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY set, 503 when not set). Frontend UI verified: Entities page, Add Entity modal, Entity Details modal with all business/personal fields, Documents section with upload form and empty state message.

features_tested.User Registration: PASS - Creates new user with token
features_tested.User Login: PASS - Returns token for existing user
features_tested.List Entities: PASS - Returns array of user's entities
features_tested.GET /api/entities/{id}/details (personal: PASS - Returns entity with personal_details, business_details=null
features_tested.GET /api/entities/{id}/details (business: PASS - Returns entity with business_details, personal_details=null
features_tested.PUT /api/entities/{id}/details (personal: PASS - Updates personal details and persists
features_tested.PUT /api/entities/{id}/details (business: PASS - Updates business details and persists
features_tested.Wrong details type validation: PASS - Returns 400 when updating personal entity with business_details
features_tested.GET /api/entities/{id}/documents: PASS - Returns empty array for new entity
features_tested.POST /api/entities/{id}/documents (with: PASS - Returns 201 with document metadata when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY set
features_tested.POST /api/entities/{id}/documents (witho: PASS - Returns 503 when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not set
features_tested.Frontend - Entities page: PASS - Shows entity cards with Personal/Business badges
features_tested.Frontend - Add Entity modal: PASS - Name input, type select, submit button
features_tested.Frontend - Entity Details modal: PASS - All business/personal detail fields present
features_tested.Frontend - Documents section: PASS - Upload form, empty state message, Upload Document button

environment_note: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is SET in backend/.env. If testing 503 behavior, remove or comment out the key and restart backend.
